# unhide()

**Type Method**

Creates an action that makes a node visible.

## Declaration

```swift
class func unhide() -> SKAction
```

## Return Value

A new action object.

## Discussion

This action has an instantaneous duration. When the action executes, the node’s [doc://com.apple.spritekit/documentation/SpriteKit/SKNode/isHidden] property is set to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false].

This action is reversible; the reversed action hides the node.

## Controlling Node Visibility

- **hide()**: Creates an action that hides a node.
